<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\TestRunner\TestResult; use PHPUnit\Event\TestSuite\Skipped; use PHPUnit\Event\TestSuite\SkippedSubscriber; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This class is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final readonly class TestSuiteSkippedSubscriber extends Subscriber implements SkippedSubscriber { public function notify(Skipped $event): void { $this->collector()->testSuiteSkipped($event); } }
